Best Buds.d: Increase the damage buff from 25% to 50%

Compiler Optimization.d: Decreases Hackstep Protocol cooldown from 20 seconds to 15 seconds.

Endless Hunge.d: Increases the duration of Apex Predator stacks from 10 seconds to 30 seconds.

From the Shadows.d: Increases max stacks for From the Shadows from 50 to 100 and stack gain from 10 to 20.

Max BPM.d: Increases max stacks for Heartstopper from 50 to 100

No Limit.d: Increases Dead Man's Hand damage bonus from 30% to 50%.

Perfect Adrenaline Rush.d:
When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 23% bonus armor for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.
Cooldown: 5s

Perfect Bloodsucker.d: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +12% bonus armor for 10s. Max stack is 10

Perfect Clutch.d: If you are below 20% armor, critical hits repair 3% missing armor. Kills allow you to repair up to 100% armor for 4-10 secondss, based on your [Weapon] core attribute.

Perfect Combined Arms.d: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage by 30% for 3 seconds.

Perfect Creeping Death.d: Causing Status Effect on an enemy has a chance to spread that same Status Effect to the nearest enemy within a 10-meter radius. Can only occur once every 10 seconds.

Perfect Overclock.d: Allies within 15 meters of your deployed skills, gain +30% reload speed and reduce their active cooldowns by 0.6 seconds each second.

Perfect Shock and Awe.d: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 27 seconds.

Perfect Tech Support.d: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 27 seconds.

Perfect Vigilance.d: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage disables this buff for 3 seconds.

Perfectly Calculated.d: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 15%.

Perfectly Opportunistic.d: Enemies you hit with shotguns and marksman rifles amplifies the damage they take by 15% from all sources for 5 seconds.

Perfectly Wicked.d: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 27 seconds.

Positive Reinforcement.d: Increases Feedback Loop skill damage and repair bonus from 10% to 25%.

Press the Advantage.d: Increases max stacks for Striker’s Gamble from 100 to 200. 3 stacks lost per second between 101 and 200 stacks.

Specialized Destruction.d: Increases Aggressive Recon weapon damage bonus from 20% to 40%.

Tactical Superiority.d: Increases Ground Control damage bonus from 15% to 25%.

Target Rich Environment.d: Increases Crowd Control mark count from 3 to 5.

Waving the Flag.d: Increases Red / White / Blue rotation speed to 1.5 seconds.

Ace in the Sleeve.d: Amplifies 1 extra shot when revealing your hand.

Blessed.d: Agents can miss a headshot before resetting the cycle

Cold.d: Increases total bonus armor gained per stack of Heartstopper from 1% to 2%.

Complete Uptime.d: Cancelling your skills will reset their cooldown.

Critical Measures.d: Increases Crowd Control damage to additional marked enemies from 60% to 100%.

Into the Light.d: Increases max stacks for Into the Light from 50 to 100, stack gain from 10 to 20 and stack consumption from 10 to 20

Multithreaded Execution.d: Increases Hackstep Protocol bonus armor from 50% to 100%.

Overwhelming Force.d: Increases the radius of disorient on Apex Predator kills from 5 meters to 10 meters.

Patriotic Boost.d:
Increases Red / White / Blue debuff strength.

Red: 8% to 12%.
White: 2% to 3%.
Blue: 8% to 12%.

Perfect Braced.d: While in cover weapon handling is increased by 50%.

Perfect Focus.d: Increases total weapon damage by 6% every second you are aiming while scoped 8x or higher, up to 60%.

Perfect Glass Cannon.d: All damage you deal is amplified by 30%. All damage you take is amplified by 60%.

Perfect Intimidate.d: While you have bonus armour, gain 1 stack each second up to a max of 8. Each stack increases total weapon damage by 5% to enemies within 10m.

Perfect Overwatch.d: After staying in cover for 8 seconds, increase your and all allies’ total weapon and skill damage by 12% as long as you remain in cover or in a cover-to-cover move.

Perfect Spark.d: Damaging an enemy with a skill increases total weapon damage by 15% for 20 seconds.

Perfect Spotter.d: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 20% to pulsed enemies.

Perfect Trauma.d: Applies blind to enemy hit in the head. Cooldown 20 seconds. Applies bleed to an enemy hit in the chest. Cooldown 20 seconds.

Perfect Vanguard.d: Deploying a shield makes it invulnerable for 5 seconds and grants 50% of your armor as bonus armor to all other allies for 20 seconds. Cooldown is 25 seconds.

Perfectly Efficient.d: Using an armor kit has a 75% chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

Perfectly Skilled.d:
Skill kills have a 30% chance to reset skill cooldowns.
If no skills were on cooldown, you instead gain one-time buff that immediately refreshes a skill's cooldown when it goes on cooldown.

Perfectly Unbreakable.d: When your armor is depleted, repair 100% of your armor. Cooldown is 55 seconds.

Process Refinery.d: Increases Makeshift Repairs speed from 15 seconds to 10 seconds.

Risk Management.d: Increases total weapon damage gained per stack of Striker's Gamble from 0.65% to 1%.

Short Circuit.d: Decreases Feedback Loop cooldown from 20 seconds to 10 seconds.

Signature Moves.d: Increases signature weapon damage by 20%, and doubles the amount of signature weapon ammo generated by Aggressive Recon.

Strategic Combat Support.d: Increases Ground Control proximity repair from 60% to 120%.

Symptom Aggravator.d: Amplifies all damage you deal to status affected targets by 30%

Trauma Specialist.d: Increases the duration of your bleed status effects by 50% and all bleed damage done by 100%.

Boomerang.d: After reloading, the first bullet deals +100% weapon damage.

Breadbasket.d: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus 35% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10 seconds. Max stack is 3.
